title: Floral Chewy Olive Stir-fry
description: A floral and chewy Egyptian dish perfect for a date night, featuring olives as the main ingredient. Pescatarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: Olive Leaves, soaked and chopped (for flavoring)
Fresh Herbs like Thyme or Rosemary

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add finely chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté until translucent.
If using sun-dried tomatoes, add them now to the mixture.
Fold in soaked and chopped olive leaves for additional flavoring.
Stir in pitted and chopped dates, crumbled feta cheese (if using), and fresh herbs like thyme or rosemary.
Simmer gently for about 10 minutes until the ingredients are well combined and flavors meld together.
Serve warm as a snack or appetizer.
